title: VariantDescriptor
description: Per-variant record produced by /prototype-feature and consumed by /iterate-on-plan --prototype-context. Each variant skeleton contributes one descriptor to prototype-findings.md.

variant_id.description: Short identifier, e.g. 'v1', 'v2'. Matches the branch suffix.

angle.description: The angle prompt that steered this variant (e.g. 'simplest', 'extensible', 'pragmatic').

vendor.description: Model identifier that produced this variant (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-6', 'gpt-5-codex', 'gemini-2.5-pro'). Records what actually ran, including fallback.

vendor_fallback.description: True when this variant ran on a fallback vendor because vendor-diversity preference could not be satisfied.

report.description: Path to or excerpt from /validate-feature smoke phase output.

covered.description: Number of SHALL/MUST scenarios from the approved spec that this skeleton covers.

total.description: Total SHALL/MUST scenarios in the approved spec.

missing.description: Scenario identifiers not covered by this skeleton.

data_model.description: True when the human selected this variant's data model during pick-and-choose.

api.description: True when the human selected this variant's API surface.

tests.description: True when the human selected this variant's test approach.

layout.description: True when the human selected this variant's file layout.

synthesis_hint.description: Optional free-text hint from the human for /iterate-on-plan --prototype-context to consider during convergence (e.g. 'prefer v1 data model but steal v3 test naming').
